case_title: LUI SUI YING VS DRAXTEN MARTEN W

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $255.00 FILED BY LUI SUI YING AS TO DEFENDANT DRAXTEN MARTEN W ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-23-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
